package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_select_default_busy_poll: Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag select loops with default branches that spin instead of blocking or using timers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule508NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario508Negative(records []Rule508NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
